summary: Level 2 subscription reliability and debugging improvements for Trading Terminal depth visibility.
release_notes: Improved Trading Terminal feed reattachment so opening the terminal on the same ticker re-subscribes Level 2 and live price streams more reliably.
Added defensive Level 2 resubscribe behavior on same-conid ticker prep to reduce stale depth state after popup reopen or reconnect.
Hardened backend depth handling to enforce a single active depth symbol and reduce TWS depth-slot conflicts.
Added depth diagnostics: websocket depth subscribe/unsubscribe logging and a new debug endpoint (/v1/api/debug/depth-state) to inspect active listeners and depth state.
